title: EventDelivery - Metadata API
description: Represents how an event instance maps to a target payload. Removed in API version 46.0. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

eventParameters.description: An array of parameters to deliver in addition to the published event’s data.

eventSubscription.description: The ID of the subscription to deliver the data to.

type.description: Determines what action occurs when the event is delivered to the listeners on behalf of the subscribers. Valid values are: StartFlow—When the event occurs, it’s delivered to a flow of type CustomEvent. Those flows are built through Process Builder. ResumeFlow—Reserved for future use.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of an event delivery file.
